name: MindReply - Customer Churn Prevention Pipeline
description: Automated churn prediction - identifies at-risk customers, triggers retention campaigns

parameters.query: SELECT user_id, email, plan FROM users WHERE last_activity < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND status = 'active'

parameters.subject: We miss you! Special offer inside
parameters.text: We noticed you haven't used MindReply lately. Here's 50% off your next month.

parameters.jsCode: if ($json.plan === 'pro') { return { offer: '3 months for $200', discount: '33%' }; } else { return { offer: '1 month free', discount: '100%' }; }

parameters.query: INSERT INTO retention_campaigns (user_id, offer, sent_at) VALUES ('={{$json.user_id}}', '={{$json.offer}}', NOW())
